root_cause.description: The application attempts to write uploaded files to the './uploads/' directory, but this directory does not exist on the filesystem and is not created automatically by the code.

learning_objectives: Learn to ensure directory existence before file operations
Understand how environment/server state affects application logic

hints.text: The error happens specifically during the file writing phase of the request.
Check if the directory specified in the 'open()' call actually exists in the project root. You might need to create it or fix the path.
